sections.heading: The Not-So-Complete (But Trying) LLM Engineer's Handbook
sections.body: A practitioner's guide covering the full LLM engineering stack — architecture, training, alignment, deployment, and optimization. Select a chapter to begin.

items.label: Foundations of Modern LLMs
items.desc: Tokenization (BPE, WordPiece), decoder-only transformers, self-attention math, RMSNorm, RoPE, scaling laws

items.label: Data Engineering at Scale
items.desc: Distributed pipelines (Ray vs Spark), MinHash deduplication, quality filtering, synthetic data generation

items.label: Continuous Pretraining
items.desc: Domain adaptation strategies, CLM loss, data mixing ratios, distributed training at 70B scale

items.label: Supervised Fine-Tuning
items.desc: Chat templates, label masking, gradient flow, LoRA/QLoRA, sequence packing, cut cross-entropy

items.label: Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning
items.desc: LoRA math and rank selection, QLoRA + NF4, DoRA (magnitude-direction), PiSSA, memory comparison

items.label: Preference Alignment
items.desc: RLHF pipeline, DPO loss derivation, KTO (unpaired data), GRPO (group reward), reward modeling

items.label: Evaluation & Benchmarking
items.desc: MMLU, HumanEval + Pass@k, data contamination detection, LLM-as-a-Judge, Arena Elo rankings

items.label: Quantization & Training Pipelines
items.desc: NF4 theory, double quantization, end-to-end QLoRA + SFT pipelines, DPO integration

items.label: The Modern LLM Stack
items.desc: Post-DPO alignment variants, precision data curation, LoRA ecosystem, inference serving overview

items.label: Inference Serving & Memory
items.desc: KV cache math, PagedAttention, continuous batching, distributed inference strategies

items.label: Diagnostics & Debugging
items.desc: CUDA OOM runbook, VRAM taxonomy, gradient checkpointing math, ZeRO stages, NaN/Inf loss

items.label: LLM Inference Engineering
items.desc: Roofline model, arithmetic intensity, KV cache evolution (MHA→GQA→MLA), scheduling

items.label: Inference Optimization
items.desc: FP8 quantization, speculative decoding, rejection sampling, Medusa tree attention, LoRAX

items.label: Frontier Architectures
items.desc: MLA deep-dive, Meta 24K GPU clusters, RoCE vs InfiniBand, o1 reasoning, scaling laws
